body_txt: When the phrase " tinpot dictator " is literal. Evil Overlords have the tendency to fight in full plate armor, even in settings where that doesn't actually make sense. Their armor usually has plenty of Spikes of Villainy and is Colour-Coded for Your Convenience in black. Usually, it conceals their face to make them appear more mysterious and menacing. Often upgraded to Powered Armor or a full-body prosthesis/life support system in more advanced settings. In fantasy settings, this is the standard look for the Black Knight . However, that doesn't always mean that an overlord of this type is solely a physical fighter. He might also be an Evil Sorcerer that made the wise choice of donning armor to offset his main weakness . Besides, they are almost always Large and in Charge so it's normal to see them as evil Magic Knights . And sometimes, the wearer might be secretly a girl . If the Evil Overlord is wearing Scary Impractical Armor , it may be used to explain why they're boiling away on their throne down in their Evil Lair , twiddling their thumbs and administering various missives to their increasingly vicious Mooks while idly ruling over their Kingdom of Darkness with an iron fist as the heroes get ever closer. Spikes of Villainy and a Badass Cape are commonly used accessories. See also Animated Armor . Contrast with Chrome Champion . Not to be confused with Master Computer , where the tyrant is made of tin.
